query:
SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.email, u.name, u.workspaceId, u.workspaceRole, u.createdAt, w.id AS ws_id, w.name AS ws_name, w.taxId, w.contactPhone, w.subscriptionStatus, w.createdAt AS ws_created FROM users u LEFT JOIN workspaces w ON u.workspaceId = w.id WHERE u.email = 'anat@leandolini.com' ORDER BY u.id DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT id, name, taxId, contactPhone, subscriptionStatus, createdAt FROM workspaces ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
command:

SELECT id, name, taxId, contactPhone, subscriptionStatus, createdAt FROM workspaces ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
